en-US.title: SUB/WAVE
en-US.subtitle: Self-hosted internet radio
en-US.description:
SUB/WAVE is a player for personal internet radio stations. One stream, one broadcast — everyone tuned in hears the same thing at the same time, with an AI DJ picking the music and talking between tracks.

The app is a client for any SUB/WAVE station. It opens on the public demo station out of the box, and you can point it at your own self-hosted station by address — no account, no sign-up.

- Live now-playing with cover art and a running timeline
- The booth: read what the DJ is saying on the mic
- Weekly show schedule
- Send a request to the station
- Background audio with lock-screen, CarPlay, and headphone controls
- Switchable colour themes

No account. No analytics. No trackers. The app stores only the list of stations you've tuned to, on your device.

review.notes: SUB/WAVE is a listener client for self-hosted SUB/WAVE internet-radio stations (open-source project). No login is required. To review live: the app opens on the public demo station at https://www.getsubwave.com — tap the power ring to tune in and you'll hear the live broadcast. UIBackgroundModes: audio is required because this is a radio player — playback continues in the background and is controllable from the lock screen / CarPlay (Play, Pause, Stop only; there is no Skip on a shared live stream). The app collects no data.
